project.name: n8n Workflow Builder
project.description: AI-powered chat UI for building production-ready n8n workflows at Guesty. Claude Sonnet 4.6 via Vertex AI, phase-gated workflow construction, department-scoped credentials, 11 data source specs, 7 expert skills, one-click deploy to n8n Cloud.
